controls.name: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
controls.description: Require MFA for all user and privileged accounts, especially for remote access.

controls.name: Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR)
controls.description: Deploy EDR solution on all endpoints to detect and respond to malicious activity.

controls.name: Security Awareness Training
controls.description: Regular security awareness training including phishing simulation exercises.

controls.name: Data Backup and Recovery
controls.description: Implement automated, encrypted, offsite backups with regular recovery testing.

controls.name: Privileged Access Management (PAM)
controls.description: Implement PAM to control and monitor privileged account access.

controls.name: Patch Management Program
controls.description: Establish automated patch management for OS, applications, and firmware.

controls.name: Network Segmentation
controls.description: Segment networks to limit lateral movement and contain breaches.

controls.name: Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM)
controls.description: Continuously monitor cloud environments for misconfigurations and compliance violations.

controls.name: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
controls.description: Deploy SIEM for centralized log collection, correlation, and alerting.

controls.name: Vulnerability Assessment Program
controls.description: Regular vulnerability scanning and penetration testing of systems and applications.

controls.name: Email Security Gateway
controls.description: Deploy email security with anti-phishing, anti-malware, and DMARC/DKIM/SPF.

controls.name: Zero Trust Architecture
controls.description: Implement Zero Trust principles - never trust, always verify.

controls.name: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
controls.description: Implement DLP to prevent unauthorized data exfiltration.

controls.name: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: Documented, tested incident response plan with defined roles and procedures.

controls.name: Third-Party Risk Management
controls.description: Assess and monitor security posture of third-party vendors and supply chain.
